cards.back: The process of automatically extracting relevant information from large volumes of unstructured text data.
The process of automatically extracting relevant information from large volumes of web data, such as HTML, images and links.
A ranking algorithm used to calculate the importance of web pages based on the number and quality of links pointing to them.
The analysis of web content to understand user behavior, preferences and engagement with web pages, such as click-through rates and time on page.
The analysis of hyperlinks on the web to understand the structure and connectivity of the web, such as link equity and authority.
